Key features of the Unior 17 cone wrenchThe 17 mm dimension corresponds to the width of the faces of the cone or nut for which the wrench is intendedDesigned for hub cones, ideal for precision wheel bearing alignmentThin 2 mm blade allows working in confined spaces without damaging surrounding partsLength of 200 mm provides sufficient leverage and control for tightening and looseningVinyl handle ensures a comfortable and non-slip gripTwo hanging holes for practical storage of the Unior 17 cone wrench in the workshopHardened carbon steel for high strength and wear resistance

Műanyag anyaga a fémekétől alacsonyabb tömege miatt népszerű a felhasználók körében, ráadásul egyszerű karbantartással büszkélkedik. A kitűnő DK PLAST ételhordót aggodalom nélkül el lehet mosni a mosogatógépben és be lehet tenni a mikrohullámú sütőbe. A minőségi DK PLAST ételhordó tömege 0,3 kg, így nem lesz feleslegesen a terhedre, bárhová is viszed az ételt. items.raw_desc: Prés Orion UH COOKIE fém tésztakinyomó + díszítő:        Dough press + decorator UH COOKIE Orion is equipped with a stepping system and made of metal . You can use it when baking cookies, Christmas cookies and other pastries made of medium-hard dough. It can also be used for coconut and walnut dough with finely ground ingredients. It works on the principle of a piston with a stepping system. The dress will help you fill cakes, cupcakes, desserts, sandwiches and other goodies. In the package you will find 20 different metal attachments for the dough press and 4 plastic attachments for the decoration. Working with the UH COOKIE Orion press is simple and fast. Thanks to its compact dimensions, it is easy to store.
